name: colorful-trees-forest-monorepo
description: Go template rainbow syntax highlighter — monorepo

scripts.build: npm run build -w @colorful-tmpl/highlight-core && npm run build -w colorful-tmpl
scripts.vscode:package: npm run build -w colorful-tmpl && cd packages/vscode && npx vsce package
scripts.vscode:install: npm run build -w colorful-tmpl && cd packages/vscode && npx vsce package && code --install-extension *.vsix
scripts.approvals:approve:all: cd packages/core/src && for f in *.received.txt; do cp "$f" "${f/.received/.approved}"; done && cd ../../.. && node scripts/glue-approvals.mjs approved
